prompts.title: Daily Ops Summary
prompts.content: Summarize the last 24 hours of system activity, highlight degraded jobs, and list the top three follow-up actions.
prompts.notes: Useful for a morning standup or async operations handoff.

prompts.title: Threat Review Pass
prompts.content: Review the current deployment notes and identify obvious threat boundaries, trust assumptions, and missing controls in concise bullets.

prompts.title: Backlog Refinement
prompts.content: Convert the provided rough task list into prioritized backlog items with clear acceptance criteria and engineering estimates.
prompts.notes: Pairs well with weekly planning notes.
